  "findings": [
    "Conductors are undersized for the calculated load and circuit length, resulting in excessive voltage drop and potential overheating."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop installation of the undersized conductors.",
    "Recalculate the required wire gauge using NEC Table 310.16 and standard voltage drop formulas for the specific run length and load.",
    "Replace the undersized conductors with the correctly sized larger gauge wire before completing the rough-in."
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing conductors that are undersized for the load and length violates NEC ampacity requirements and exceeds acceptable voltage drop limits (typically 3% for branch circuits, 5% overall). This poses a fire hazard and can cause equipment malfunction, requiring immediate failure and corrective action while the work is still in progress.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 310.14",
    "NEC Table 310.16",
    "NEC 210.19(A) Informational Note 4"
  ]
}
